story.text:
# ✨ Shift the Light
*hermaion · registry*

The archetype-modal ceremony: as the visitor enters, the alexandrite reads the archetype-light and shifts (green for Mage, red for Swordsman); the keeper appears in the matching aspect; the artefact-class to be fitted is announced.

*Keywords:* archetype-modal · alexandrite · shift · color-mage · color-swordsman
